title: 10 best herbal creams for hair fall

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Aloe creams helps with hair fall because they promote healthy scalp conditions, reducing inflammation and itchiness that can lead to excessive shedding. The anti-inflammatory properties in aloe vera soothe an itchy scalp, calming redness and irritation, while its moisturizing effects hydrate the hair follicles, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth. As a result, aloe creams help reduce hair fall by strengthening hair roots and increasing blood flow to the scalp, leading to thicker, healthier-looking locks.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Aloe vera's anti-inflammatory compounds, such as aloin and aloe-emodin, help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss by reducing blood flow and damaging follicles.

Antioxidant properties: Aloe vera's antioxidant compounds, including vitamins C and E, beta-carotene, and other phenolic acids, neutralize free radicals that can damage hair follicles and cause hair fall, promoting healthy scalp and hair growth.

Wound-healing and soothing properties: Aloe vera's gel contains acemannan, a complex sugar that promotes wound healing by stimulating collagen synthesis and improving tissue elasticity, which can help soothe an itchy or irritated scalp and promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_parts: Leaves: Known for their gel-like interior, which provides moisture and nourishment to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth.
Roots: Rich in antioxidants and minerals that help to strengthen hair follicles and reduce dandruff.
remedy_recipe: Collect pure aloe vera gel from 2-3 ripe aloe vera leaves and extract its juice using a cheese cloth or fine mesh strainer.
Mix the extracted aloe vera juice with 20 grams of coconut oil and 10 grams of olive oil in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add 5 grams of glycerin, 2 grams of vitamin e oil, and 1 gram of biotin powder to the mixture while stirring constantly for 10 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from heat and let it cool down completely before transferring the mixture to a sterilized glass jar for storage.
Allow the mixture to infuse for at least 2 weeks by storing it in a cool dark place, shaking the jar every day before using as hair cream.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: White inga creams helps with hair fall because they promote a healthy scalp environment by reducing inflammation and itchiness. The herbal extracts in these creams nourish the scalp, strengthening hair follicles and preventing further damage. Additionally, white inga creams contain antioxidants that help to repair damaged hair and promote growth. This results in thicker, fuller locks that are less prone to falling out, leaving you with a luscious mane that's full of life and vitality.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Inga cream's antioxidant compounds help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation that can contribute to hair loss.

Strengthening Hair Follicles: The creams' natural extracts, such as inositol and other polyphenols, stimulate blood flow to the scalp and strengthen hair follicles, promoting healthy hair growth and preventing excessive shedding.

Anti-Inflammatory Action: Inga cream's anti-inflammatory compounds, including flavonoids and terpenes, help soothe an itchy, irritated scalp and reduce inflammation that can lead to hair loss by reducing the production of pro-inflammatory cytokines.
remedy_parts: Roots: Known for their anti-inflammatory properties, roots help soothe scalp irritation and reduce inflammation associated with hair loss.
Barks: The bark contains flavonoids that promote hair growth by increasing blood flow and strengthening hair follicles.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh leaves of inga alba from mature trees ensuring optimal potency.
Dry the harvested leaves in a well-ventilated area or using a food dehydrator at 40°c for 24 hours.
Grind 20g of dried inga alba leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle taking approximately 10 minutes.
Mix the ground inga alba powder with 100ml of sweet almond oil and 50ml of coconut oil in a double boiler at low heat for 30 minutes.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth or a coffee filter into clean glass containers allowing the cream to cool completely before use within 72 hours.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ginseng creams helps with hair fall because it stimulates blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. The cream's antioxidants also help to nourish the hair follicles, reducing inflammation and damage caused by free radicals. Additionally, ginseng's adaptogenic properties help to balance hormones, which can contribute to hair loss in both men and women. By targeting these underlying causes of hair fall, ginseng creams provide a natural solution for promoting thicker, healthier-looking hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Ginseng cream's antioxidant properties help to neutralize free radicals that can damage hair follicles and cause hair loss, promoting healthy hair growth.

Stimulatory Effects on Hair Growth: Ginseng contains compounds that stimulate blood flow to the scalp, increasing oxygen and nutrient delivery to hair follicles, which promotes hair growth and strengthens existing hair.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Ginseng cream's anti-inflammatory properties help to reduce inflammation in the scalp, which can cause hair loss by damaging hair follicles and preventing new hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: Ginseng roots have been shown to promote hair growth and improve scalp health, making them an effective ingredient in hair fall creams.
Rhyzomes: The rhyzome, a type of underground stem, contains ginsenosides which have anti-inflammatory properties that can help soothe the scalp and promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh panax ginseng roots of high quality and clean them thoroughly.
Grind the cleaned panax ginseng roots into fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix 20 grams of ground panax ginseng root powder with 100 grams of coconut oil in a heat-resistant container.
Heat the mixture slowly over low heat for 1 hour and stir occasionally to create a smooth consistency.
Strain the final mixture through cheesecloth or a fine-mesh sieve into a clean glass jar and allow it to cool completely.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Ashwagandha creams helps with hair fall because of its unique ability to reduce stress and anxiety, which are common triggers for hair loss. The herb's adaptogenic properties help to calm the mind and body, promoting a healthy scalp environment that fosters hair growth. Additionally, ashwagandha has anti-inflammatory properties that soothe an itchy scalp, reducing irritation and inflammation that can contribute to hair fall. By using ashwagandha creams on the scalp, individuals may experience improved hair health and reduced shedding over time.
remedy_properties: Adaptogenic property: Ashwagandha's adaptogenic property helps to reduce stress and anxiety, which are common causes of hair fall by promoting a healthy scalp environment and reducing cortisol levels.
Anti-inflammatory property: The anti-inflammatory property of Ashwagandha helps to soothe an itchy scalp, reduces redness, and calms irritated skin, thus preventing further hair loss.
Antioxidant property: Ashwagandha's antioxidant property neutralizes free radicals that can damage hair follicles, promote premature graying, and lead to hair fall.
remedy_parts: Roots: Ashwagandha roots contain withanolides, which have been shown to promote hair growth and reduce dandruff.
Leaves: The leaves of the ashwagandha plant are rich in antioxidants that help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals.
remedy_recipe: Harvest dried ashwagandha root powder measuring 10 grams per 100 milliliters of base cream.
Combine the powder with a carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil in a double boiler setup at 60 degrees celsius.
Steep the mixture for 30 minutes under low heat to facilitate herbal extraction and infusion.
Allow the mixture to cool down to room temperature before filtering it through a cheesecloth or coffee filter into a clean container.
Whip the filtered cream with a hand mixer or whisk until it reaches a smooth and creamy consistency suitable for application on the scalp.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Coconut creams helps with hair fall because they nourish and moisturize the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. The fatty acids and antioxidants in coconut creams strengthen hair follicles, reducing breakage and preventing split ends. Additionally, the cream's antifungal and antibacterial properties help to control dandruff and itchiness, creating a favorable environment for hair growth. As a result, herbal coconut creams can help to reduce shedding and promote thick, luscious locks.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Coconut cream with anti-inflammatory herbs like turmeric or ginger can reduce scalp inflammation, which is often a underlying cause of hair loss.

Antioxidant properties: Herbal coconut creams rich in antioxidants from ingredients like rosemary or chamomile can protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, promoting healthy hair growth.

Moisturizing and nourishing properties: Coconut cream with herbs like aloe vera or biotin can deeply moisturize and nourish the hair and scalp, strengthening hair roots and reducing breakage and fall.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and antimicrobial properties, coconut roots help promote hair growth by reducing inflammation and scalp irritations.
Barks: Containing flavonoids and phenolic compounds, coconut barks have been shown to inhibit the formation of DHT, a hormone that contributes to hair loss.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh cocos nucifera leaves and rinse them thoroughly with distilled water.
Dry the cocos nucifera leaves in a shade-free area for 7-10 days until crisp and brittle.
Combine 20g of dried cocos nucifera leaves with 100ml of sweet almond oil and 50ml of coconut oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at 60°c for 2 hours, then allow it to cool and strain through cheesecloth into a clean glass jar.
Add 20g of beeswax and mix until fully incorporated, then pour the cream into a tin container and refrigerate for 24 hours before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Neem creams helps with hair fall because they possess anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties that promote a healthy scalp environment. Neem's antibacterial compounds combat scalp infections, which can cause hair loss, while its moisturizing effects nourish the scalp and strengthen hair follicles. Additionally, neem's antioxidant properties protect the hair shaft from damage caused by free radicals, promoting thicker, fuller hair growth and reducing shedding. By addressing these underlying causes of hair fall, neem creams provide a natural and effective solution for promoting healthy, vibrant hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Neem's antioxidant properties help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to hair loss and promote healthy hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Neem's anti-inflammatory properties reduce redness, swelling, and itching on the scalp, making it an effective remedy for conditions like dandruff, psoriasis, and dermatitis that can lead to hair fall.

Antifungal and antibacterial properties: Neem's antifungal and antibacterial properties help control fungal and bacterial infections on the scalp, which can cause hair loss by damaging the hair follicles and preventing new hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, neem roots are commonly used to stimulate hair growth and reduce dandruff.
Seeds: Neem seeds contain nimbin, a bioactive compound that has been shown to promote hair follicle regeneration and prevent hair loss.
remedy_recipe: Grind 20 grams of dried neem leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle for 10 minutes.
Combine the ground neem powder with 100 milliliters of coconut oil in a heat-resistant glass bowl.
Heat the mixture over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the oil turns dark brown and has a strong aroma.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool to room temperature before filtering it through a cheesecloth into another container.
Store the azadirachta indica cream in an airtight container at room temperature for up to 6 months before applying it to your scalp 2 times daily.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Drumstick creams helps with hair fall because they nourish and strengthen the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth. The antioxidants and vitamins present in these creams help to stimulate blood flow to the scalp, reducing dandruff and itchiness that can contribute to hair loss. Additionally, drumstick creams moisturize and hydrate the hair follicles, leaving them strong and resilient to prevent breakage and thinning. Regular use of these creams can lead to a reduction in hair fall and an overall improvement in hair health and appearance.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Drumstick cream's antioxidant properties help protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in drumstick cream soothe and calm irritated scalps, reducing inflammation that can lead to hair loss and promoting a healthy scalp environment for hair growth.

Stimulating Hair Growth Hormones: The herbal extract in drumstick cream is believed to stimulate the production of hormones that promote hair growth, such as testosterone and dihydrotestosterone (DHT), which helps to strengthen and thicken existing hair.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, drumstick roots help to reduce scalp inflammation and promote hair growth.
Rhyzomes: Containing bioactive compounds like flavonoids and terpenes, drumstick rhyzomes exhibit anti-dandruff properties and soothe an itchy scalp.
Barks: Packed with phytochemicals and flavonoids, drumstick barks have been traditionally used to treat hair loss by stimulating hair follicles and promoting hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 20 grams of dried moringa oleifera leaves and grind them into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 2 minutes.
Mix the ground moringa powder with 100 milliliters of coconut oil and 50 milliliters of olive oil in a heat-resistant bowl.
Heat the mixture over low heat on a stovetop or in a microwave-safe container at 30-second intervals, stirring between each interval, for 5 minutes until well combined.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool to room temperature before adding 20 milliliters of distilled water and 10 grams of beeswax.
Whisk the mixture until smooth and creamy, then transfer it to an air-tight container and store it in a refrigerator for up to 6 months after preparation time.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Henna creams helps with hair fall because they promote a healthy scalp environment, rich in oxygen and nutrients. The antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties present in henna cream help to reduce oxidative stress and inflammation, which can cause hair loss. Additionally, the natural conditioning agents in henna cream strengthen hair follicles, reducing breakage and thinning, while its antifungal and antibacterial properties combat scalp infections that may contribute to hair loss.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Henna's antioxidant properties help to protect the scalp from free radical damage, reducing oxidative stress that can contribute to hair loss.

Stimulates Blood Flow: The anti-inflammatory and vasodilatory properties of henna help to increase blood flow to the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth by delivering essential nutrients and oxygen.

Antibacterial and Antifungal Properties: Henna's antibacterial and antifungal properties help to control fungal and bacterial infections on the scalp that can cause hair loss, such as dandruff, ringworm, and other scalp irritations.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help to stimulate hair growth and reduce scalp irritation.
Seeds: Contain a high concentration of fatty acids and vitamins, making them an effective natural remedy to nourish and strengthen hair follicles.
remedy_recipe: Harvest lawsonia inermis leaves and dry them thoroughly for 24 hours under shade.
Grind the dried lawsonia inermis leaves into a fine powder using a mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered lawsonia inermis with coconut oil and olive oil in a ratio of 2:1 by weight.
Heat the mixture gently over low heat for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it reaches a smooth consistency.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth to remove any solids, resulting in a final product ready for use within 7 days.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Rosemary creams helps with hair fall because it stimulates blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. The antioxidant properties of rosemary also help to reduce inflammation and prevent damage to the hair follicles, allowing hair to grow thicker and stronger. Additionally, rosemary's astringent qualities help to tighten the pores on the scalp, reducing shedding and promoting a fuller, more voluminous look. Regular use of rosemary creams can lead to a noticeable reduction in hair fall and an improvement in overall hair health.
remedy_properties: Cicatrizant: Rosemary's cicatrizant property helps to promote tissue repair and reduce inflammation, which can aid in preventing further hair loss and promoting healthy hair growth.
Anti-inflammatory: Rosemary's anti-inflammatory properties can help to soothe and calm the scalp, reducing redness and irritation that may contribute to hair fall.
Antioxidant: Rosemary's antioxidant properties help to protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, which can lead to premature aging and hair loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and essential oils, making them effective in promoting hair growth and strengthening hair follicles.
Leaves: Packed with vitamins A and E, as well as camphor, which helps to stimulate blood flow and promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of fresh rosmarinus officinalis leaves and rinse them gently with distilled water.
Blend the leaves with 20g of coconut oil in a blender or food processor for 30 seconds.
Combine the blended mixture with 50g of beeswax pellets and 10g of vitamin e oil, then melt at 60°c for 10 minutes.
Add 100ml of distilled water to the melted mixture and stir until it cools down to 40°c over 15 minutes.
Pour the cooled mixture into sterilized glass jars and store them in a cool dark place for at least 24 hours before use.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Thyme creams helps with hair fall because it promotes a healthy scalp environment, rich in oxygen and nutrients. The antibacterial properties of thyme cream help to reduce inflammation and soothe an itchy scalp, allowing for optimal hair growth. Additionally, thyme's antifungal properties combat dandruff and other scalp issues that can contribute to hair loss. By nourishing the scalp and addressing underlying issues, thyme creams provide a natural solution for promoting healthy, strong hair growth and reducing excessive shedding.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Thyme's antioxidants help protect the scalp from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to hair loss by reducing inflammation and promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Thyme's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce redness and swelling on the scalp, which can alleviate conditions like dandruff, psoriasis, and eczema that can cause hair fall.

Antimicrobial properties: Thyme's antimicrobial agents help kill bacteria and fungi that can infect the scalp and lead to hair loss, such as ringworm and other fungal infections that can cause bald patches.
remedy_parts: Roots: Thyme roots are known for their ability to stimulate blood flow and promote healthy hair growth, making them a popular choice for hair loss treatments.
Seeds: Thyme seeds contain antioxidants that help protect the scalp from damage and promote hair follicle health, leading to thicker and healthier hair.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh thymus vulgaris leaves at dawn for optimal potency and dry them in shade for two weeks.
Crush 50 grams of dried thymus vulgaris leaves into fine powder using mortar and pestle within five minutes.
Combine the powdered thymus vulgaris with 200 milliliters of carrier oil such as coconut or olive oil at room temperature for an hour.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler until it reaches 60 degrees celsius, then remove from heat and let cool for three hours.
Strain the mixture through cheesecloth and discard solids before pouring into sterile jars and storing them in refrigerator for up to six months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Sage creams helps with hair fall because of its remarkable ability to promote healthy scalp circulation, reduce inflammation, and nourish the follicles. The antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties in sage cream help to calm irritated scalps, allowing hair growth to flourish. Additionally, sage cream's moisturizing benefits hydrate the hair shaft, reducing breakage and frizz while promoting a healthy, shiny appearance. As a result, hair fall is significantly reduced, leading to thicker, fuller locks.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Sage's antioxidant properties help reduce oxidative stress on the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss by protecting the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals.

Anti-Inflammatory Properties: Sage's anti-inflammatory compounds help reduce inflammation on the scalp, which can cause hair loss by blocking the blood flow to the hair follicles and reducing the growth cycle of hair.

Cicatrizant and Wound Healing Properties: Sage's cicatrizant properties promote wound healing and tissue regeneration, which can help stimulate hair growth by promoting the proliferation of hair cells and improving scalp health.
remedy_parts: Roots: Sage roots are rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds, which help soothe an itchy scalp and promote healthy hair growth.
Leaves: Sage leaves contain camphor, a natural oil that stimulates blood flow to the scalp, reducing dandruff and promoting hair follicle health.
remedy_recipe: Harvest fresh salvia officinalis leaves in the morning after dew has dried.
Dry the harvested leaves in a warm and well-ventilated area for 7 days.
Grind 20 grams of dried salvia officinalis leaves into fine powder using mortar and pestle.
Mix the powdered salvia with 100 milliliters of coconut oil and heat gently at low temperature.
Strain the mixture through a cheesecloth or muslin cloth to remove any impurities.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Maidenhair tree creams helps with hair fall because they contain a rich blend of antioxidants, vitamins, and minerals that nourish and revitalize the scalp. The cream's active ingredients stimulate blood flow, promoting healthy hair growth by strengthening hair follicles and thickening strands. Additionally, maidenhair tree extract has been shown to inhibit the formation of DHT, a hormone responsible for hair loss. By tackling these underlying causes of hair fall, maidenhair tree creams provide a natural solution for promoting a full and luscious head of hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Ginkgo biloba's antioxidant properties help protect the scalp and hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-Inflammatory Effects: The cream's anti-inflammatory properties soothe an itchy scalp, reduce redness and irritation, and help alleviate conditions like dandruff and psoriasis that can contribute to hair loss.

Stimulating Blood Flow: Ginkgo biloba's vasodilatory effects improve blood circulation to the scalp, increasing oxygen and nutrient delivery to the hair follicles, promoting healthy growth and reducing the risk of hair loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: The roots of the maidenhair tree contain natural antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds that help to promote healthy scalp and reduce dandruff, contributing to a reduction in hair fall.

Barks: The barks of the maidenhair tree have been traditionally used to treat hair-related issues such as premature graying, balding, and thinning, due to its ability to stimulate blood flow and promote collagen production.
remedy_recipe: Grind 250 grams of dried ginkgo biloba leaves into fine powder using a mortar and pestle for about 30 minutes.
Mix the powdered ginkgo biloba with 100 grams of coconut oil in a heat-resistant mixing bowl.
Add 50 grams of beeswax to the mixture and stir until it is fully incorporated and melted over low heat for 10-15 minutes.
Remove the mixture from heat and let it cool to room temperature before whipping it into a creamy consistency using an electric mixer for about 5 minutes.
Transfer the herbal cream to an airtight container and store it in the refrigerator for up to 6 months or use immediately after preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Asiatic pennywort creams helps with hair fall because of its potent antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herb is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins that nourish the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth by increasing blood circulation and reducing oxidative stress. It also inhibits the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone responsible for hair loss, thereby strengthening hair follicles and preventing further damage. As a result, Asiatic pennywort creams can help reduce excessive shedding, promote thicker, fuller hair, and even stimulate hair regrowth.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant Properties: Asiatic Pennywort contains antioxidants that neutralize free radicals, reducing oxidative stress and inflammation in the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss.
Anti-inflammatory Properties: The cream's anti-inflammatory compounds help soothe and calm irritated scalps, reducing redness and swelling, and promoting a healthy environment for hair growth.

Stimulant Properties: Asiatic Pennywort stimulates blood circulation, increasing oxygen and nutrient supply to the scalp, which can help promote thicker, stronger hair growth by nourishing individual follicles.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in saponins, roots are believed to promote hair growth and strengthen hair follicles.
Rhyzomes: With their high concentration of starch and mucilage, rhyzomes help to moisturize and nourish the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Measure and mix 20 grams of beeswax, 10 grams of coconut oil, and 10 grams of olive oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture until the beeswax melts completely and the temperature reaches 65 degrees celsius over 15 minutes.
Add 5 grams of dried centella asiatica leaves to the mixture and stir well for 5 minutes before removing from heat.
Allow the mixture to cool down to 50 degrees celsius and then whip it with a spatula until it thickens and emulsifies over 10 minutes.
Transfer the cream to sterilized containers and store them in the refrigerator at 5-8 degrees celsius for up to 6 months after preparation.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Turmeric creams helps with hair fall because they contain curcumin, a potent antioxidant that promotes healthy scalp function. Curcumin reduces inflammation in the scalp, which can cause hair loss by blocking the growth of new hairs. Additionally, it stimulates blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing dandruff and itchiness. By nourishing and protecting the scalp, turmeric creams create a favorable environment for hair growth, leading to thicker, fuller, and healthier-looking locks.
remedy_properties: Anti-inflammatory properties: Turmeric's active compound, curcumin, helps reduce inflammation on the scalp, which is a common underlying cause of hair loss.
Antioxidant properties: Curcumin and other antioxidants in turmeric cream help neutralize free radicals that can damage hair follicles and lead to hair fall.
Wound-healing properties: Turmeric's anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties also promote wound healing, which is essential for repairing damaged scalp tissue and promoting healthy hair growth.
remedy_parts: Rhyzomes: Rich in curcumin, the rhizome of turmeric has potent anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that help promote hair growth and reduce dandruff.
Roots: Turmeric roots contain a significant amount of turmerone, a sesquiterpene that helps to stimulate hair follicles and improve scalp health.
remedy_recipe: Extract 10 grams of dried turmeric powder using 100 milliliters of coconut oil for 2 hours under warm sunlight.
Heat the extracted mixture in a double boiler at low heat for 30 minutes until it reaches a temperature of 70 degrees celsius.
Add 20 grams of beeswax and 10 grams of shea butter to the heated mixture, stirring until they melt completely after 5 minutes.
Allow the mixture to cool and solidify at room temperature for 30 minutes before whipping it with an electric mixer for 2 minutes.
Fill sterilized containers with the final product, labeling each container with the preparation date and storing it in the refrigerator for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Grape creams helps with hair fall because they nourish the scalp and strengthen the roots, promoting healthy hair growth. The antioxidants present in herbal grape extracts stimulate blood circulation to the scalp, which enhances follicle production and reduces shedding. Additionally, grape creams rich in vitamins A, C, and E help to repair damaged hair and prevent split ends, leading to thicker and fuller locks. By targeting both the root cause of hair fall and the visible signs of damage, herbal grape creams provide a holistic solution for healthy, luscious hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Grape seed extracts contain powerful antioxidants that help neutralize free radicals, which can damage hair follicles and contribute to hair loss.

Stimulating blood circulation: Herbal grape creams containing ingredients like ginseng and rosemary oil can stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth by delivering essential nutrients and oxygen to hair follicles.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The antioxidants and polyphenols present in herbal grape creams can help reduce inflammation in the scalp, which is a common underlying cause of hair loss conditions such as alopecia areata.
remedy_parts: Roots: Grape roots are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, which help promote hair growth and reduce inflammation in the scalp.
Barks: The barks of the grape plant contain phenolic compounds that have anti-inflammatory properties, helping to soothe an itchy scalp and prevent hair loss.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry 20 grams of fresh vitis vinifera leaves for one week in shade.
Combine the dried leaves with 10 milliliters of sweet almond oil in a double boiler.
Heat the mixture at 60 degrees celsius for 30 minutes while stirring occasionally.
Strain the infused oil through cheesecloth and combine it with 5 grams of beeswax and 5 milliliters of coconut oil.
Pour the mixture into sterilized containers and let it cool before storing in airtight containers at room temperature.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Saw palmetto creams helps with hair fall because they contain a unique compound that blocks the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT), a hormone that contributes to hair loss. By reducing DHT levels, saw palmetto cream may help prevent hair follicles from shrinking and eventually falling out. Additionally, its anti-inflammatory properties can help soothe an itchy scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and strengthening the roots of existing hairs.
remedy_properties: 5-alpha-reductase inhibition: Saw palmetto cream's ability to inhibit the conversion of testosterone to dihydrotestosterone (DHT) helps reduce DHT-related hair follicle shrinkage, leading to reduced hair fall.

Anti-inflammatory properties: Saw palmetto's anti-inflammatory effects help soothe and calm the scalp, reducing inflammation and irritation that can contribute to hair loss and promote healthy hair growth.

Antioxidant activity: Saw palmetto's antioxidant properties help protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals, promoting a healthy hair growth environment and reducing oxidative stress that can lead to hair loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in fatty acids and sterols, which help nourish and strengthen hair follicles, reducing the risk of hair loss.
Barks: Containing bioactive compounds like lupeol and ß-sitosterol, which have anti-inflammatory properties that promote healthy scalp conditions for better hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 50g of dried serenoa repens leaves and stems from a reputable source.
Grind the dried plant material into a fine powder using a spice grinder for 3 minutes.
Combine the powder with 100ml of cold-pressed coconut oil and stir until well-mixed.
Heat the mixture in a double boiler at 60°c for 30 minutes, then strain through cheesecloth.
Pour the infused oil into glass jars and store in a cool dark place for up to 6 months.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Lemongrass creams helps with hair fall because of its unique combination of antifungal, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The citral content in lemongrass oil promotes blood circulation to the scalp, reducing dandruff and itchiness that can contribute to hair loss. Additionally, lemongrass's natural astringent properties help to purify the scalp and reduce product buildup, allowing for healthy hair growth. By nourishing the scalp and promoting a healthy environment, lemongrass creams can help to stimulate hair growth and reduce fall.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Lemongrass cream's antioxidant properties help combat oxidative stress, which can damage hair follicles and contribute to hair loss, by neutralizing free radicals and reducing inflammation.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in lemongrass cream reduce redness, swelling, and irritation on the scalp, promoting a healthy environment for hair growth and preventing further hair loss.

Antifungal and antibacterial properties: Lemongrass cream's antifungal and antibacterial properties help control infections caused by fungal or bacterial overgrowth on the scalp, which can contribute to hair loss and promote healthy hair growth.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants and antimicrobial properties, lemongrass roots help to promote hair growth by reducing inflammation and preventing damage.
Rhyzomes: Lemongrass rhyzomes contain oils that stimulate blood flow to the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth and reducing dandruff.
remedy_recipe: Harvest 100g of fresh cymbopogon citratus leaves from the market or cultivate them in your garden.
Dry the harvested leaves in shade for 7-10 days, stirring occasionally, until they become crumbly and brittle.
Blend 50g of dried cymbopogon citratus leaves with 20g of coconut oil in a grinder for 30 seconds, until well combined.
Heat the blended mixture in a double boiler at 60°c for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, to extract essential oils and fatty acids.
Strain the hot mixture through a cheesecloth into a clean glass container, discarding solids, and let it cool before storage.

remedies_list.remedy_desc: Pot marigold creams helps with hair fall because of its unique combination of antioxidants, flavonoids, and polyphenols that stimulate blood flow to the scalp. This increased circulation promotes healthy hair growth by nourishing the follicles and strengthening the roots. Additionally, the anti-inflammatory properties of pot marigold cream soothe an itchy scalp, reducing tension and stress that can contribute to hair loss. As a result, regular use of these creams can help to stimulate hair growth, reduce breakage, and promote a fuller, healthier head of hair.
remedy_properties: Antioxidant properties: Pot marigold's antioxidant properties help to neutralize free radicals that can damage the scalp and cause hair loss, promoting healthy hair growth.

Anti-inflammatory properties: The anti-inflammatory compounds in pot marigold cream reduce redness, swelling, and irritation on the scalp, which can contribute to hair fall by creating an environment conducive to hair growth.

Wound-healing and cicatricial properties: Pot marigold's wound-healing and cicatricial properties help to repair damaged hair follicles and promote collagen synthesis, which can help to strengthen hair roots and prevent further hair loss.
remedy_parts: Roots: Rich in antioxidants, pot marigold roots help reduce oxidative stress and promote healthy scalp conditions.
Seeds: High in fatty acids, pot marigold seeds nourish and moisturize the scalp, promoting strong and healthy hair growth.
remedy_recipe: Harvest and dry calendula flowers by air drying or dehydrating for at least 24 hours to preserve their bioactive compounds.
Grind 100 grams of dried calendula flowers into a fine powder using a spice grinder or mortar and pestle.
Combine the ground calendula powder with 50 milliliters of sweet almond oil and 20 grams of beeswax in a double boiler setup.
Heat the mixture over low heat for approximately 30 minutes or until the wax is fully melted and the mixture reaches a temperature of around 180 degrees fahrenheit.
Pour the cream into sterilized glass containers and let it cool and solidify at room temperature before storage.

intro_desc: Herbal creams for hair fall are natural topical treatments that utilize plant-based ingredients to nourish and strengthen the scalp, promoting healthy hair growth. These creams work by stimulating blood flow, reducing dandruff and itchiness, and moisturizing the scalp, which helps to prevent hair loss. Examples of herbal creams that help with hair fall include Bhringaraj oil, Amla cream, and Brahmi paste. For instance, Bhringaraj oil has been shown to promote hair growth by increasing the production of keratin, while Amla cream helps to strengthen hair follicles and reduce split ends. By using these creams, individuals can improve their overall scalp health, leading to thicker, fuller, and healthier-looking hair.
supplementary_best_treatment: The best way to treat hair fall with herbal creams is by using a blend of potent herbs that stimulate hair growth, improve blood circulation, and reduce inflammation. Look for creams containing Bhringaraj, Amla, and Brahmi, which have been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to promote healthy hair growth. Apply the cream to the scalp, massage gently, and leave it on for 30 minutes before washing with a mild shampoo.
supplementary_causes: Ailments similar to hair fall that are treated with herbal creams are eczema, acne, and skin irritation. Herbal creams containing natural ingredients like aloe vera, tea tree oil, and chamomile can help soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting healthy skin growth. These creams can also be used to treat minor cuts and burns, as well as conditions such as psoriasis and rosacea.
